title: MC:KAISEN
body:
# MC KAISEN
**An open-world JJK-themed semi-anarchy server.**

This server is built around player freedom. It is not a traditional roleplay or lore server as the lore is created by the choices players make and the history they leave behind.

There are very few restrictions. Your goal is simple: become as strong as you possibly can with what you’re given(or don’t.) That choice is yours.

You can start clans, form alliances, betray enemies, wage wars, build empires, or survive completely on your own. What happens on the server is up to the players.

In the near future, I’ll also be making content based on the events, conflicts, and stories that unfold here.

[Youtube Shorts Trailer](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/6qWNBHVockw)
